attribute_list.color: Semi Screaming Green / Core Black / Iron Metallic

product_description.title: ADISTAR XLG 2.0 SHOES
product_description.text:
The Adistar XLG 2.0 shoes are part of the adidas Originals family. Inspired by the running silhouettes of the 00s, they have been reimagined for today's urban lifestyle.

The mesh base and reflective details add a touch of modernity, while the rubber outsole provides reliable grip and durability. Adiprene cushioning in the heel provides extra comfort.

These shoes are a testament to adidas' commitment to quality and innovation. Whether you're navigating city streets or enjoying a casual day out, these shoes help you do it with style and ease.
product_description.subtitle: Shoes with Adiprene cushioning for everyday comfort and flexible support.
